selections.name: Altus Hanover
selections.reason: Draws the Mohawk sweet spot (Post 6) and gets a class equalization boost shipping in from Pocono (Tier 2). Strong closing speed.

selections.name: Massive Opulence
selections.reason: Lands in the highly favorable Post 4 and shows consistent sub-30 second final quarters against similar company.

selections.name: Duke Lavictoire
selections.reason: Solid baseline rating and draws well inside. Forgive the Batavia ship as the raw speed figures hold up nicely.

selections.name: Wolfpack Cheddar
selections.reason: Gets the +3 point sweet spot bonus from Post 5. Has shown tactical speed to get into the mix early.

danger_horse.name: Mass Cara
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw protects this one from early trouble; capable of a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Icey Seaside
selections.reason: Massive class advantage shipping from The Meadows (Tier 2) combined with the Post 4 sweet spot bonus.

selections.name: Groove
selections.reason: Huge par adjustment shipping in from Lexington (Tier 1). The outside post is the only hurdle, but class prevails.

selections.name: I'msodelightful
selections.reason: Draws perfectly in Post 5 and boasts a strong 96 raw rating. Will be positioned perfectly for the stretch drive.

selections.name: Storming Blues
selections.reason: Another beneficiary of the outside-center sweet spot. Has the stamina to grind it out if parked early.

danger_horse.name: Lucean
danger_horse.reason: Consistent performer with a 95 raw rating; inside draw ensures an economical trip.

selections.name: Tymal Loverboy
selections.reason: Gets the +3 point bonus from Post 6. Strong raw rating of 94 makes him a prime candidate for a second-over trip.

selections.name: Stars In My Crown
selections.reason: Shipping in from Miami Valley (Tier 2) gives a solid par adjustment boost. Can overcome the outside draw.

selections.name: Jeffery J
selections.reason: Highest raw rating in the field (95), but takes a slight penalty for the rail draw risk of getting shuffled.

selections.name: Saint Stephens
selections.reason: Solid 93 overall rating and draws well to secure a prime stalking position.

danger_horse.name: Midnight Swan
danger_horse.reason: Takes a penalty for Post 8, but raw talent is undeniable if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Baby Bob
selections.reason: Elite raw rating of 101, gets a +5 par adjustment from Dover Downs, and lands in the Post 5 sweet spot.

selections.name: Delayed Hanover
selections.reason: Outstanding 100 raw rating and draws the coveted Post 4. Will be firing early.

selections.name: Wolfpack Zach
selections.reason: Benefits from the Post 6 bonus and has the tactical speed to secure a live helmet.

selections.name: Ordained
selections.reason: Raw rating of 100 is elite for this level; penalized for Post 8 but still a massive threat to hit the ticket.

danger_horse.name: Full Rights
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw is tricky, but raw speed makes him dangerous if the gaps open up.

selections.name: Stonebridge Bomber
selections.reason: Top raw rating in the field (96) and draws perfectly inside to control his own destiny.

selections.name: Comeonover Hanover
selections.reason: Consistent 95 rating with a great post to secure an economical trip.

selections.name: Star Pilot
selections.reason: Draws the Post 4 sweet spot which elevates his 92 raw rating into prime contention.

selections.name: Free Willy Hanover
selections.reason: Post 5 bonus puts him right in the mix. Capable of grinding first-over if necessary.

danger_horse.name: Mystical Somolli
danger_horse.reason: Post 6 bonus makes him a live longshot if the pace is hot up front.

selections.name: Up Helly Aa
selections.reason: Elite 100 raw rating combined with the Post 6 sweet spot bonus makes him the clear standout.

selections.name: Dewey Arnold
selections.reason: Draws Post 5 and boasts a 98 raw rating. Will be a major factor in the final quarter.

selections.name: But Why
selections.reason: Highest raw rating (101) but draws outside. Still a massive threat based on pure class.

selections.name: Ice Breakers K
selections.reason: Gets a +5 par adjustment shipping from Running Aces. Rail penalty hurts slightly, but class is there.

danger_horse.name: Staghouse
danger_horse.reason: Solid inside draw and consistent speed figures make him a dangerous exotic piece.

selections.name: Kody Kickstand
selections.reason: Massive 105 raw rating and lands in the Post 5 sweet spot. Looks dominant on paper.

selections.name: Uncle Rat
selections.reason: Huge par adjustment shipping from Miami Valley (+5). Class drop makes him a major player despite Post 7.

selections.name: Lets Go North
selections.reason: Gets the Post 6 bonus to elevate a solid 95 raw rating. Good tactical speed.

selections.name: Demin N Diamonds
selections.reason: Inside draw protects this consistent performer; will be saving ground for the stretch.

danger_horse.name: Doctor Strange
danger_horse.reason: Good post position and capable of hitting the board at a price.

selections.name: D A Miss Universe
selections.reason: Massive +10 par adjustment shipping from Woodbine Mohawk Park. Post 6 bonus makes her the absolute standout.

selections.name: Century Liberty
selections.reason: Another huge shipper, coming from the Meadowlands (+10). Post 5 sweet spot ensures a prime trip.

selections.name: Jk's Time To Shine
selections.reason: Hoosier Park shipper (+5) with a great inside draw. Will be tracking the top two.

selections.name: Artic Thunder
selections.reason: Post 4 bonus helps elevate this local contender into the exotics mix.

danger_horse.name: Captain Sassy
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could lead to a shuffle, but has the raw speed to factor if the gaps open.

selections.name: Arlanda
selections.reason: Draws the Post 4 sweet spot, elevating a solid 93 raw rating to the top of this wide-open field.

selections.name: Packmia
selections.reason: Highest raw rating (94) in the field. Outside post is a hurdle, but class is evident.

selections.name: Paradise Moni
selections.reason: Gets the +3 bonus from Post 5. Tactical speed will be key here.

selections.name: Miss Bliss
selections.reason: Inside draw ensures an economical trip; consistent speed figures.

danger_horse.name: Tiktok Roy
danger_horse.reason: Solid post and capable of grinding out a minor share.

selections.name: Nottingham

selections.name: Secret Or Not
selections.reason: Highest raw rating (97) but takes a slight penalty for the rail draw. Still very dangerous.

selections.name: Help Us Help You

selections.name: Talismano
selections.reason: Post 4 bonus puts him right in the mix; capable of grinding first-over.

danger_horse.name: Gypsy Rose Lou

selections.name: Spagz One
selections.reason: Massive +10 par adjustment shipping from the Meadowlands. Class prevails despite the rail draw.

selections.name: Dark N Tan
selections.reason: Highest raw rating in the field (98) and draws perfectly in the Post 4 sweet spot.

selections.name: Ibetyouakiss
selections.reason: Consistent 96 raw rating and draws inside to ensure an economical trip.

selections.name: Ariels Bet
selections.reason: Matches Ibetyouakiss with a 96 rating and a great post. Will be in the hunt.

danger_horse.name: Takes No Bull

selections.name: Sevenatchi
selections.reason: Gets the Post 4 sweet spot bonus to elevate a solid 90 raw rating.

selections.name: Oh Brother
